locations: form, under heading “Please fix the following errors:”
findings.summary: 3 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #email (contrast 3.39), #password (contrast 3.39), #password (contrast n/a)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.
